name: capstan
description: A harness-first framework for building agent-operable software.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @capstan/app-graph && npm run build --workspace @capstan/packs-core && npm run build --workspace @capstan/brief && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-web && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-agent && npm run build --workspace @capstan/compiler && npm run build --workspace @capstan/feedback && npm run build --workspace @capstan/release && npm run build --workspace @capstan/harness && npm run build --workspace @capstan/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @capstan/app-graph && npm run build --workspace @capstan/packs-core && npm run build --workspace @capstan/brief && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-web && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-agent && npm run build --workspace @capstan/compiler && npm run build --workspace @capstan/feedback && npm run build --workspace @capstan/release && npm run build --workspace @capstan/harness && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/app-graph && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/packs-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/brief && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/surface-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/surface-agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/compiler && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/feedback && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/release && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/harness && npm run typecheck --workspace @capstan/cli
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @capstan/app-graph && npm run build --workspace @capstan/packs-core && npm run build --workspace @capstan/brief && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-web && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-agent && npm run build --workspace @capstan/compiler && npm run build --workspace @capstan/feedback && npm run build --workspace @capstan/release && npm run build --workspace @capstan/harness && tsx ./packages/cli/src/index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @capstan/app-graph && npm run build --workspace @capstan/packs-core && npm run build --workspace @capstan/brief && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-web && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-agent && npm run build --workspace @capstan/compiler && npm run build --workspace @capstan/feedback && npm run build --workspace @capstan/release && npm run build --workspace @capstan/harness && vitest run
scripts.test:watch: npm run build --workspace @capstan/app-graph && npm run build --workspace @capstan/packs-core && npm run build --workspace @capstan/brief && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-web && npm run build --workspace @capstan/surface-agent && npm run build --workspace @capstan/compiler && npm run build --workspace @capstan/feedback && npm run build --workspace @capstan/release && npm run build --workspace @capstan/harness && vitest
